title: Roasted Dense Venezuelan Vegetable Hash
description: A light and flavorful Venezuelan dish featuring roasted vegetables, this hash is perfect for a snack or side dish. It is made with vegetable oil and cured with ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat a tava-griddle over medium heat.
In a large bowl, toss the sweet potatoes, carrots, zucchini, red bell pepper, and onion with 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the vegetables out in a single layer on the preheated tava-griddle.
Roast the vegetables for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until they are tender and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic to the tava-griddle and stir to combine.
Continue to roast for an additional 5 minutes, until the garlic is fragrant.
Remove the tava-griddle from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the roasted vegetable hash hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
